LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF THOMAS O'SHEA'S MOTION REQUESTING THE COURT'S SIGNATURE ON/APPROVAL OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION GRANTED. ALTHOUGH PETITIONER DISCLAIMS THE PRESCRIPTIONS OF CCP SECTION 877.6, THE COURT SUPPRESSES ITS INSTINCT TO DENY THE INSTANT MOTION AND GRANTS THE ILLEGITIMATELY-FORMULATED MOTION AT BAR SO AS TO OBVIATE FURTHER LEGAL EXPENSES FOR THE PARTIES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: QUENTIN L. KOPP, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-15-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT MERRIMAN CURHAN FORD & CO.'S Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Off Calendar, per settlement. (302/QLK) JUDGE: QUENTIN L. KOPP, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of And Motion Requesting The Court'S Signature On/Approval Of Settlement Agreement;
Off Calendar Apr-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF THOMAS O'SHEA'S Motion Requesting the Court's Signature On/Approval of Settlement Agreement. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion Granted. Although petitioner disclaims the prescriptions of CCP section 877.6, the Court suppresses its instinct to deny the instant motion and grants the illegitimately-formulated motion at bar so as to obviate further legal expenses for the parties. Order signed in open Court. (302/KOPP/JW)Judge: Quentin Kopp; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

MOTION To File Documents Under Seal
Off Calendar Apr-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT MERRIMAN CURHAN FORD & CO'S MOTION to File Documents Under Seal. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. (302/KOPP/JW)Judge: Quentin Kopp; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

Notice Of And Motion Requesting The Court'S Signature On/Approval Of Settlement Agreement;
Off Calendar Apr-07-2009 Continued To Apr-13-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion continued to April 13, 2009 on the Court's own motion. (302CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
